tool_args.label: Approval of 2024 Committee Work Plan
tool_args.raw_text: Approval of 2024 Committee Work Plan - January 2024

payload.description: The Committee will approve the Proposed Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan for 2024 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Committee will approve the Proposed Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan for 2024

payload.description: The Agency will present its revised 2024 Financial Plan reflecting the 2024 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2024.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Agency will present its revised 2024 Financial Plan.

payload.description: A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.

evidence_refs.source_quote: A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.

payload.description: Annual report to the Committee on system-wide reliability and availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Annual report to the Committee on system-wide reliability and availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.

payload.description: A report will be presented to the Committee on Metro-North's ridership trends during 2023 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by Metro-North.

evidence_refs.source_quote: A report will be presented to the Committee on Metro-North's ridership trends during 2023 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by Metro-North.

tool_args.label: Final Review of 2023 Operating Budget Results
tool_args.raw_text: Final Review of 2023 Operating Budget Results - May 2024

evidence_refs.source_quote: Final Review of 2023 Operating Budget Results
A review of the prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance will be presented to the Committee.

payload.description: A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.

tool_args.label: Key Performance Metrics Reports description
tool_args.raw_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.
